data.en: What would you like to eat?
data.hint: Would like to + verb / 想要做某事

data.en: I would like a hot tofu dish.
data.hint: Would like + noun / 想要某物

data.en: Would you like rice or noodles?
data.hint: Alternative question with 'or' / 使用 'or' 的选择疑问句

data.en: We should also order a salad.
data.cn: 我们也应该点一份沙拉。
data.hint: Modal 'should' + base verb / 情态动词 should + 动词原形

data.en: I want some beef and carrot dumplings.
data.cn: 我想要一些牛肉胡萝卜饺子。
data.hint: 'Some' used in affirmative sentences / 'some' 用于肯定句

data.en: Do you have anything with tofu?
data.cn: 你们有任何带豆腐的菜吗？
data.hint: 'Anything' used in questions / 'anything' 用于疑问句

data.en: That sounds good.
data.hint: Linking verb 'sounds' + adjective / 系动词 sounds + 形容词

data.en: Which soup would you like?
data.hint: Question word 'Which' for choices / 询问选择用 'Which'

data.en: Here is a menu for you.
data.hint: Here is + singular noun / Here is + 单数名词

data.en: We often have it in America.
data.cn: 我们在美国经常吃这个。
data.hint: Preposition 'in' for countries / 国家前用介词 'in'

data.en: What do you usually have for breakfast?
data.hint: Preposition 'for' + meal / 介词 'for' + 三餐名称

data.en: I usually have some bread and milk.
data.cn: 我通常吃些面包喝点牛奶。
data.hint: Uncountable nouns / bread 和 milk 是不可数名词

data.en: Sometimes I have eggs and beans.
data.hint: Countable plural nouns / 可数名词复数形式

data.en: My family likes pizza for dinner.
data.hint: Family as a singular collective unit / family 作为一个整体作单数

data.en: I usually have lunch at school.
data.hint: Phrase 'at school' / 固定搭配 'at school'

data.en: Eating three meals a day is important.
data.hint: Gerund subject 'Eating' / 动名词 'Eating' 作主语

data.en: Some people don't have breakfast.
data.hint: No article before meal names / 三餐名称前一般不加冠词

data.en: They are too busy to eat anything.
data.cn: 他们太忙了，什么都吃不下。
data.hint: Too... to... structure / 太...以至于不能...

data.en: I eat them on time.
data.hint: Phrase 'on time' = punctually / 固定短语 on time (按时)

data.en: We can cook our own meals.
data.hint: Modal 'can' + base verb / 情态动词 can + 动词原形

data.en: I drink a lot of water.
data.hint: Water is uncountable / water 是不可数名词

data.en: Do you want some fruit?
data.hint: Fruit is usually uncountable / fruit 通常作不可数名词

data.en: Soft drinks have a lot of sugar.
data.hint: Sugar is uncountable / sugar 是不可数名词

data.en: She eats an apple every day.
data.hint: Article 'an' before a vowel sound / 元音音素前用 'an'

data.en: Would you like some more chips?
data.hint: Plural countable noun 'chips' / 可数名词复数 chips

data.en: I try to drink more milk.
data.hint: Milk is uncountable / milk 是不可数名词

data.en: I eat vegetables with every meal.
data.hint: Vegetable is countable / vegetable 是可数名词

data.en: Do you have any cookies?
data.hint: Use 'any' in questions / 疑问句中使用 'any'

data.en: I have a pear and a banana.
data.cn: 我吃了一个梨和一个香蕉。
data.hint: Article 'a' before consonants / 辅音音素前用 'a'

data.en: I do not eat sweets.
data.hint: Plural noun 'sweets' / 可数名词复数 sweets (糖果/甜食)

data.en: Fast food makes us put on weight.
data.hint: Make + object + base verb / make 宾语 + 动词原形

data.en: It is important to eat three meals.
data.hint: It is + adj + to do / it 作形式主语

data.en: Food gives us energy for work.
data.cn: 食物给我们提供工作的能量。
data.hint: Give somebody something / give 双宾语结构

data.en: You are what you eat.
data.hint: Common English proverb / 英语常见谚语

data.en: I should drink more water.
data.hint: Modal 'should' + base verb / 情态动词 should 后加动词原形

data.en: They usually have lots of sugar.
data.cn: 它们通常含有大量的糖。
data.hint: Lots of + uncountable noun / lots of 修饰不可数名词

data.en: This can cause tooth problems.
data.hint: Tooth problem (noun adjunct) / 名词作定语修饰名词

data.en: Why don't you have some fruit?
data.cn: 你为什么不吃些水果呢？
data.hint: Why don't you... for suggestions / Why don't you... 用于提建议

data.en: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
data.cn: 一天一苹果，医生远离我。
data.hint: Third-person singular 'keeps' / 第三人称单数动词加s

data.en: I drink too many soft drinks.
data.hint: Too many + plural noun / too many 修饰可数名词复数

data.en: We must eat different types of food.
data.cn: 我们必须吃不同类型的食物。
data.hint: Types of food / ...的类型

data.en: Milk is good for our bones.
data.cn: 牛奶对我们的骨骼有好处。
data.hint: Be good for = beneficial / be good for 对...有益

data.en: Eating fat gives us energy.
data.cn: 吃脂肪给我们提供能量。
data.hint: Gerund 'Eating' as singular subject / 动名词作主语谓语用单数

data.en: Bad eating habits stay with us.
data.cn: 不良的饮食习惯会伴随我们。
data.hint: Plural subject 'habits' takes base verb / 复数主语用动词原形

data.en: We should eat balanced meals.
data.cn: 我们应该吃均衡的膳食。
data.hint: Adjective 'balanced' / 形容词 'balanced' (均衡的)

data.en: Not all fat makes us gain weight.
data.cn: 并不是所有的脂肪都会让我们增加体重。
data.hint: Make us + base verb / make 宾语 + 动词原形

data.en: It helps our body work well.
data.cn: 它有助于我们的身体良好运转。
data.hint: Help + object + base verb / help + 宾语 + 动词原形

data.en: We cannot eat those foods alone.
data.cn: 我们不能只吃那些食物。
data.hint: Plural demonstrative 'those' / 复数指示代词 'those'

data.en: It is best to develop good habits.
data.hint: It is best to do... / 最好做某事

data.en: Milk contains many nutrients.
data.cn: 牛奶含有许多营养物质。
data.hint: Third-person singular 'contains' / 第三人称单数动词加s
